---
title: "Example Document"
format: html
---

## Introduction
 
This is a simple Quarto document created for demonstrating Git and GitHub workflows.

## Summary Statistics on Main
 
This section was added on `main` and will conflict with testbranch.

## Analysis on testbranch
 
This section was added on `testbranch` to demonstrate branching.

```{r}
plot(cars$speed, cars$dist,
     main = "Speed vs Stopping Distance",
     xlab = "Speed (mph)",
     ylab = "Distance (ft)",
     pch = 19, col = "steelblue")
```
